phrases.english: I would like to order a falafel sandwich, please.
phrases.arabic: أود أن أطلب سندويتش فلافل من فضلك.
phrases.pronunciation: Awad an atlub sandwich falafel min fadlak.
phrases.context: Use this when ordering food at a restaurant or cafe.

phrases.english: This food is very delicious, thank you.
phrases.arabic: هذا الطعام لذيذ جداً، شكراً لك.
phrases.pronunciation: Hatha al-ta'am latheeth jiddan, shukran lak.
phrases.context: Say this to compliment the cook or server on a meal.

phrases.english: Can I have the bill, please?
phrases.arabic: هل يمكنني الحصول على الفاتورة، من فضلك؟
phrases.pronunciation: Hal yumkinuni al-husool 'ala al-fatoorah, min fadlak?
phrases.context: Use this when you are ready to pay after eating.
Inform your server about any food allergies to ensure safety.
Ask this when you need to buy groceries or food items.
